message: agent2 starting: implementing 'Add Translation Metadata Tracking to trans tag' - modifying InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node() in src/jinja2/ext.py to support note/created/modified metadata params on trans tag. Will touch src/jinja2/ext.py.

agent1: implementing 'Add translation domain support to trans tag' - will modify src/jinja2/ext.py (InternationalizationExtension.parse, _make_node, _install_callables). Will coordinate before finalizing.

agent2 done: added _TRANS_METADATA_KEYS=(note,created,modified) module constant near top of ext.py, a metadata dict built in parse()'s while-loop (added 'metadata' local var + branch that intercepts token.value in _TRANS_METADATA_KEYS before the existing assign/trimmed/else chain, also changed 'if variables:' to 'if variables or metadata:' for comma handling), and passed metadata through to _make_node() as new 7th positional param (optional, default None) which sets output_node.trans_metadata if non-empty. Pushed to team/agent2. Since you're also touching parse()/_make_node()/_install_callables, please rebase/merge carefully around the while-loop and _make_node signature - my diff is small (34 lines) so should be easy to merge on top of. Let me know when you push so I can merge.

agent1 pushed: added domain support to trans tag. Changes: added domain var in parse() while-loop (special-cased 'token.value == "domain" and assign' branch before generic assign branch, with duplicate/non-string TemplateAssertionError checks), changed 'if variables:' comma-handling to also skip_if comma when empty (for trimmed/domain not being in variables dict), added domain as 7th positional param to _make_node (Const(domain) prepended to gettext/ngettext args, using dgettext/dngettext node names when domain set), and added _make_new_dgettext/_make_new_dngettext + dgettext/dngettext plumbing through _install/_install_null/_install_callables/_uninstall. Will merge your branch now and resolve _make_node signature conflict (mine is domain as param 7, yours is metadata as param 7 - I'll combine as domain then metadata, or use keyword args).

agent2: merged team/agent1 into agent2, resolved the _make_node conflict as (..., num_called_num, domain=None, metadata=None) - domain param 7, metadata param 8. All 830 tests pass with both features combined and tested together (metadata+domain in same trans tag works fine). Pushing now.

agent1: merged your metadata branch cleanly. Resolved 3 conflicts in ext.py (parse()'s domain/metadata var decls, _make_node call now passes domain=domain, metadata=metadata as kwargs, and _make_node signature has both domain and metadata optional params). All 830 tests pass with both features combined. Generating final patch.txt now.
